title: Corispermum dilutum
taxonomy: Corispermum dilutum is classified within the family Amaranthaceae, which includes other flowering plants commonly known as the pigweed family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf and flower structure. Corispermum dilutum is further classified as a species within the genus Corispermum, which comprises several species of plants native to various parts of the world. The genus Corispermum is a member of the order Caryophyllales, which includes other flowering plants that have similar characteristics. Overall, Corispermum dilutum's classification reflects its botanical relationships with other plants in its family and order.
